name: opencrow
description: Self-hosted multi-agent AI platform with 90+ tools, vector memory, and real-time market streaming

scripts.service:install: bun run src/cli.ts service core install
scripts.service:reinstall: bun run src/cli.ts service core reinstall
scripts.service:uninstall: bun run src/cli.ts service core uninstall
scripts.service:start: bun run src/cli.ts service core start
scripts.service:stop: bun run src/cli.ts service core stop
scripts.service:restart: bun run src/cli.ts service core restart
scripts.service:status: bun run src/cli.ts service core status
scripts.service:web:install: bun run src/cli.ts service web install
scripts.service:web:reinstall: bun run src/cli.ts service web reinstall
scripts.service:web:uninstall: bun run src/cli.ts service web uninstall
scripts.service:web:start: bun run src/cli.ts service web start
scripts.service:web:stop: bun run src/cli.ts service web stop
scripts.service:web:restart: bun run src/cli.ts service web restart
scripts.service:web:status: bun run src/cli.ts service web status
